stemHtml: Prolonged exposure to loud noise can lead to Noise-Induced Hearing Loss (NIHL) and alter the sensory threshold of the ear. What is true about Noise-Induced Hearing Loss?

options.a: It decreases the sensory threshold of the ear, resulting in higher sensitivity.
options.b: It can either decrease or increase the threshold unpredictably in all individuals.
options.c: It causes only temporary hearing effects with no long-term consequences.
options.d: It increases the sensory threshold for all or certain frequencies.
